```{=html}
<div style="width:90%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0.7em;">

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:16px;padding:1em 1.1em 1.05em;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(86,84,162,0.1);text-align:left;border:1px solid rgba(86,84,162,0.22);">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.55em;margin-bottom:0.55em;">
    <div style="width:2.2em;height:2.2em;border-radius:0.55em;background:#EEEDF8;border:1px solid #C7C1E5;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#5654A2;"><i data-lucide="rotate-ccw" style="width:1em;height:1em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
    <div>
     <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;">issue 01</div>
     <div style="font-size:0.78em;font-weight:700;color:#5654A2;">Reproducibility</div>
    </div>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;line-height:1.55;margin-bottom:0.55em;">AI sessions are <strong>not deterministic</strong>. Different versions, different prompts, different output.</div>
   <div style="background:#1E1E2E;border-radius:8px;padding:0.5em 0.7em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;line-height:1.7;text-align:left;">
    <div style="color:#5C6B80;"># helper drafted with</div>
    <div><span style="color:#FFB84D;">claude-sonnet-4-6</span><span style="color:#F8F7F0;">,</span> <span style="color:#69B4F0;">2026-05-12</span></div>
   </div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:16px;padding:1em 1.1em 1.05em;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(212,95,71,0.1);text-align:left;border:1px solid rgba(212,95,71,0.22);">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.55em;margin-bottom:0.55em;">
    <div style="width:2.2em;height:2.2em;border-radius:0.55em;background:#FCEEEC;border:1px solid #F0C5BA;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#D45F47;"><i data-lucide="mic" style="width:1em;height:1em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
    <div>
     <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;">issue 02</div>
     <div style="font-size:0.78em;font-weight:700;color:#D45F47;">Disclosure</div>
    </div>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;line-height:1.55;margin-bottom:0.55em;">Journals, conferences, funders ask. The honest answer is almost always <strong>yes</strong>.</div>
   <div style="background:#1E1E2E;border-radius:8px;padding:0.5em 0.7em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;line-height:1.55;text-align:left;color:#F8F7F0;font-style:italic;">
    "Code drafts were generated with <span style="color:#FFB84D;font-style:normal;">[model]</span> and reviewed and modified by the authors before use."
   </div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:0.85em;text-align:center;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.06em;font-style:italic;">
  one comment, one sentence &nbsp;·&nbsp; protects future-you
 </div>

</div>
```
